description: Optimize LinkedIn connection requests and follow-up DMs for AI automation agency owner

voice_references.opener_style: jon_buchan — charm offensive, playful, quirky pattern interrupts
voice_references.value_positioning: jay_abraham — Strategy of Preeminence, trusted advisor, lead with value

audiences: Home services company owners (contractors, plumbers, HVAC)
Marketing agency owners who could refer clients

eval_criteria.reply_rate_potential: Would this get a response from a busy business owner? (1-10)
eval_criteria.authenticity: Does it feel human and genuine, not like a bot? (1-10)
eval_criteria.value_signal: Does it communicate value in the first 2 sentences? (1-10)
eval_criteria.curiosity: Does it create enough intrigue to warrant a reply? (1-10)
eval_criteria.brevity: Under 300 chars for connection, under 500 for DM? (1-10)

mutation_strategy: Analyze weakest scoring criterion per batch, generate mutations that specifically address that weakness while preserving strengths
